about.title: Who I am and what I do
about.description:
Developer with over 10 years of IT experience across demanding sectors including banking, logistics, aeronautics and healthcare. Today my focus is on intelligent automation and full stack development helping companies gain time and scale through technology.

I work with N8N and OpenAI to build high-impact automations, from simple integrations to complex AI-driven flows. On the development side, I use Node.js, TypeScript, React, GraphQL and databases like PostgreSQL (Supabase) and MongoDB, with infrastructure on AWS (EC2).

I have hands-on experience monitoring infrastructure with Zabbix, Grafana and Datadog, which allows me to build solutions with stability and production in mind from day one. Available for remote or hybrid work, CLT or PJ.

description: Responsible for developing and maintaining all company automations, connecting tools, APIs and internal flows to increase operational efficiency.
Created automations with N8N for automatic content generation and publishing on social media.
Integration between platforms using Supabase, JavaScript and REST APIs.
Autonomous management of the company's technical infrastructure.
Implemented AI on the platform to answer student questions, reducing human support load.
Participated in company improvement metrics, generating annual savings of over R$ 100,000.
Participated in platform migration to a new technology, unifying projects and generating financial savings and client satisfaction.
Responsible for receiving, analyzing and fixing bugs reported by students on the platform.
Worked on both backend and frontend using MongoDB, Node.js, React, TypeScript, GraphQL and RESTful APIs.
Created and maintained monitoring dashboards with Grafana and alerts with Zabbix.
Participated in the action that prevented a million-dollar fraud attempt against the company.
Promoted three times for exceptional performance over 6 years.
Responsible for sustaining transaction authorizers, maintaining 100% uptime.
Created automations for banking processes (banking vans, FTP, report reconciliation).
Led technical support team and created technical documentation.
Administration and configuration of systems and servers (Windows Server, Linux).
Recovered a server attacked by malware with minimal data loss.
Created a backup automation that accelerated problem resolution for clients.
Remote customer service, router configuration and local network setup.

projectList.name: SCGTR
projectList.description: Complete operational and financial management system for transportation companies. Register daily routes, define values per route and package, track unresolved occurrences (PNR), and monitor earnings in real-time. Built with ASP.NET Core 9, Entity Framework, SQLite and React.

projectList.name: Blog API
projectList.description: RESTful blog API built with Node.js following a layered architecture (controllers, models, middlewares). Complete structure for post management and user authentication.

projectList.name: Snake Game
projectList.description: Classic Snake game built in JavaScript with responsive design using Tailwind CSS.

projectList.name: JotaWallet
projectList.description: Personal finance management app with an intuitive dashboard and customizable reports.

projectList.name: Text Encryptor
projectList.description: File encryption tool built with TypeScript and Node.js. Receives a file, encrypts its content while maintaining the original format, and allows decryption using the corresponding key file.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real systems, in production, built from scratch.
projects.ecosystemTitle: A complete internal tool suite built for Euphonia Oratória
projects.ecosystemDescription: All projects below are part of an internal tool ecosystem I developed autonomously for the company I currently work for. From AI-powered WhatsApp onboarding automation, content generation and social media publishing to real-time student goal tracking. Each piece was built from scratch, integrated with Supabase, and designed to scale.

list.name: TA Euphonia
list.description: Goal tracking system for 100+ students with real-time sync via Supabase. Allows viewing individual progress, accessing mentorship meetings via embedded Zoom, listening to podcasts and much more.

list.name: Atena Dashboard
list.description: Dashboard for the AI-powered WhatsApp onboarding automation system (GPT-4o-mini). Displays student status in real time and monitors active onboarding journeys, allowing you to identify when a student is struggling and provide immediate support.

list.name: Euphonia Admin
list.description: Internal admin tool for general environment control. Dispatch and management of weekly, monthly and one-off messages. Indicator dashboard with diverse community control metrics.

list.name: Link Hub
list.description: Personal link aggregator with categorization and cloud sync. Replaces browser bookmarks with a clean, searchable interface accessible from any device.

list.name: My Task Manager
list.description: Full-featured task manager with projects, recurring routines and step-by-step status control. Supports daily, weekly, monthly and yearly frequencies with a visual overdue indicator and team task creation.
